expected_path_note: exclusion_check=Yes (supplier of goods to construction businesses, no own construction contracts) -> exit
name: Synthetic Construction Partner 13 – Cement Supplier To Contractors Nigeria
activities: Chinedu Okafor owns a building-materials trading company in Lagos that sells cement, rebar and aggregates. Among its customers are several large contractors executing federal road projects, alongside private builders and retailers. The company itself holds no construction contracts of any kind — it delivers materials to customer warehouses and sites against invoices, and its file shows a diversified customer ledger.
